title: deltadiscs
description: this modpack replaces minecraft discs with deltarune music (still working on the disc names)
body:
[deltadiscs trailer](https://youtu.be/jfaKmQXLcX4?si=3gNx_s3AUhLR53JS)this is a modpack that adds deltarune music discs to the game just for fun.
i originally made this modpack for me and my friends but they said i should publish it so i did.
this mod includes the following:

girl next door,
attack of the killer queen,
BIG SHOT,
when i get happy i dance like this,
queen,
dont forget,
friendship,
THE WORLD REVOLVING,
lantern,
the door,
darkness falls,
thrash machine,
hip shop,
feild of hopes and dreams,
susie,
the chase,
the legend,
the beginning,
lancer and
rude buster
